summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the rebuilt Retreats page for 'Movement Shala' brand. All features working correctly including Hero section, Upcoming Retreats cards, Apply Modal with form submission, Who Our Retreats Are For section, Testimonials carousel, Past Retreats Gallery with lightbox, Instagram grid section, and Private/Corporate Retreats enquiry form. Both forms successfully submit to /api/contact endpoint.
passed_tests: Hero section: 'Movement Shala' brand name visible
Hero section: 'Where Travel Meets Movement and Mind' headline displayed
Hero section: Subheading 'Small, intimate groups...' visible
Upcoming Retreats: 'Bali Movement Camp' card displayed with date (1st – 7th September 2026)
Upcoming Retreats: 'The Snow Playground' card displayed with date (9th – 14th February 2027)
Upcoming Retreats: Both cards have 'Apply Now' and 'View Details' buttons
Apply Modal: Opens when clicking 'Apply Now' on Bali retreat
Apply Modal: Shows retreat title, date, location, and highlights list
Apply Modal: Form fields (name, email, phone, message) present and functional
Apply Modal: Form submission calls /api/contact and closes modal with success toast
Who Our Retreats Are For: Section displays 4 numbered points
Testimonials: Carousel with 4 navigation dots (testimonial-dot-0 through testimonial-dot-3)
Testimonials: Clicking dots changes testimonial content (Aarav → Priya → Karan → Meera)
Past Retreats Gallery: Horizontal scrollable gallery with 8 images
Past Retreats Gallery: Scroll buttons (left/right) present
Past Retreats Gallery: Clicking image opens lightbox with navigation arrows
Past Retreats Gallery: Lightbox shows image counter (1 / 8)
Instagram Section: '@movementshala' heading visible
Instagram Section: 6 image grid displayed
Instagram Section: 'Follow on Instagram' CTA button present
Private & Corporate Retreats: 'Enquire Now' button opens enquiry modal
Enquiry Modal: Form fields (name, email, phone, message) present
Enquiry Modal: Form submission calls /api/contact and closes modal with success toast
Backend /api/contact: Returns 200 with proper response structure
Backend /api/contact: Validates required fields (email)
Backend /api/contact: Rejects invalid email format
Backend /api/retreats: Returns retreat data
Backend /api/testimonials: Returns testimonial data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Retreats page completely rebuilt and tested. All sections working: Hero, Upcoming Retreats (Bali Sep 2026, Gulmarg Feb 2027), Who Our Retreats Are For (4 points), Testimonials carousel (4 testimonials with dot navigation), Past Retreats Gallery (8 images with lightbox), Instagram grid (6 images), Private/Corporate Retreats with enquiry form. Both Apply Now and Enquire Now forms submit to /api/contact endpoint successfully. Email sending is configured but email_sent returns false (likely due to Resend API key configuration in preview environment - this is expected behavior).
